title: oreorchis patens
intro: Oreorchis patens, also known as the Chinese golden orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oreorchis patens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Oreorchis patens is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
